rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JIMMIE LEE GILYARD
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the verification of each "supplment" referred to the "petition," not to the supplement it purported to verify and was not, in fact, a statement made by the petitioner seeking to be appointed as a fiduciary but by the attorney. Also, the Proof of Service - Civil is the incorrect form for Probate proceedings; the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-121 is the only proper form of notice of a petition to administer an estate, the reverse side of which is the proper proof of service, and other notices in Probate proceedings must be served on the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-120 (Notice of Hearing); however, no notice was required for a supplement to the petition, and notice was arguably not required to be given to the two persons nominated as guardians of any minor children of the decedent, as all children are adults. Status of closing estate set for 6/26/19.
